The application window opened on 24 June 2026 and closes on 8 July 2026, making this a time‑sensitive opportunity for local job seekers. Eligible candidates must apply online via the bank’s careers portal and meet the specified educational, domicile, and age criteria to be considered for the two‑stage selection process (online exam followed by personal interview). Additionally, candidates must hold an MS-CIT certificate or an equivalent computer course recognized by the Government of Maharashtra (as per Govt. letter no. 277/39 dated 4 Feb. 2013). However, if candidates from other districts are unavailable, those seats will be filled from Sangli domiciles.

_labels.apply_online: Apply Online for Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment 2026

content_sections.heading: What is Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: The Sangli District Central Co-operative Bank Ltd., Sangli has officially launched its Clerk (Junior Assistant) Recruitment 2026, inviting online applications from eligible graduates across Sangli District. With 444 vacancies on offer, this is one of the most significant cooperative bank hiring drives in Maharashtra this year. The online application window opened on 24 June 2026 and closes on 8 July 2026- making it a time-sensitive opportunity for job seekers in the region. Whether you're a fresh graduate looking for your first banking role or an experienced candidate seeking stable government-linked employment, this notification covers everything you need to know.

content_sections.heading: Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full official notification before applying. The notification PDF contains all detailed guidelines including document specifications, payment instructions, and terms & conditions. Extended Link For Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment 2026 Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download Apply Online for Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment 2026 The notification is available from 24 June 2026. Any amendments or corrigenda will also be published on the same portal.

rows.information: Sangli District Central Co-operative Bank Ltd.

content_sections.heading: Important Dates – Sangli DCC Bank Junior Assistant 2026
content_sections.text: Never miss a deadline. Here's a consolidated view of all critical dates:

rows.event: Extended Last Date to Apply Online

content_sections.heading: Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Understanding the eligibility criteria is the first step before applying. This section covers educational qualifications, domicile requirements, and other key conditions. To be considered for the Junior Assistant role, candidates must fulfil all of the following conditions as on the date of application: A graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Additionally, candidates must hold an MS-CIT certificate or an equivalent computer course recognized by the Government of Maharashtra (as per Govt. letter no. 277/39 dated 4 Feb. 2013). Accepted equivalents include D.O.A.C.C. and N.E.I.L.L.I.T. New Delhi certificates. Exception: Candidates who are Graduates or Post-Graduates in Computer Science / Information Technology (IT) are exempt from the MS-CIT requirement. Domicile of Sangli District is mandatory . Candidates must submit a valid domicile certificate at the time of application. As per a Maharashtra Government resolution dated 08/05/2026, 70% of seats are reserved for Sangli District domiciles and 30% are open for candidates from other districts. However, if candidates from other districts are unavailable, those seats will be filled from Sangli domiciles.

content_sections.heading: Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Age eligibility is calculated as of a specific reference date. Here's what you need to know: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Reference Date: 20/06/2026 Candidates must have been born not earlier than 21/06/1991 to be eligible. Age relaxation, if any, will be governed by applicable rules; candidates should check the official notification for the latest updates.

content_sections.heading: Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Salary & Probation Details 2026
content_sections.text: One of the most searched queries around this recruitment is the salary structure. Here's a breakdown: During the 12-month probation period , selected clerks will receive a monthly stipend of ₹22,000/- . After successful completion of probation, the candidate will be placed in the bank's regular Clerk grade and will receive full emoluments as per the bank clerk pay scale. Confirmation into regular service will depend on satisfactory assessment of work performance, attendance records, and confidential reports during the probation period. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: The selection process for the Junior Assistant post involves two stages. Understanding this process helps candidates prepare strategically. Stage 1: Online Examination All shortlisted applicants will appear for an online computer-based test. Stage 2: Personal Interview Candidates who meet the cut-off in the online exam and whose educational documents are verified will be called for a personal interview conducted at Sangli. The final merit list will be prepared in descending order based on scores obtained across both stages combined.

content_sections.heading: Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Exam Pattern 2026
content_sections.text: The online examination structure is clearly defined, covering multiple subject areas. Here's the complete pattern: Key Points: The exam will be conducted in English and Marathi only. There is negative marking - 0.25 marks will be deducted for each wrong answer. Unanswered questions carry no penalty . Minimum qualifying marks: 50% (i.e., 45 out of 90) to be shortlisted for the interview. The bank reserves the right to revise the cut-off.

content_sections.heading: Examination Centres for Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Exam
content_sections.text: The online examination will be held at four designated centres. Candidates should note their preferred centre while applying: Sangli Kolhapur Satara Pune The bank reserves the right to allot any centre to any candidate. No change of centre requests will be entertained. Personal interviews will be held exclusively at Sangli .

content_sections.heading: Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Apply Online 2026
content_sections.text: The application process is entirely online. No offline or postal applications will be accepted. Follow the step-by-step guide below to complete your registration without errors. Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Online Application 2026 – Step-by-Step Step 1: Visit sanglidccb.bank.in/career and click "APPLY ONLINE" . Step 2: Select "Click here for New Registration" and enter your name, contact details, and email ID. A provisional registration number and password will be generated and sent via email/SMS. Step 3: Log in and fill in all required fields carefully. Use "SAVE AND NEXT" to save your progress between sessions. Step 4: Upload scanned copies of your: Photograph (4.5cm × 3.5cm, colour, 20–50 KB, JPG format) Signature (black ink, 140×60 pixels, 10–20 KB) Left Thumb Impression (240×240 pixels, 20–50 KB) Hand-Written Declaration (in English, black ink, 800×400 pixels, 50–100 KB) Step 5: Preview all entries carefully before clicking "COMPLETE REGISTRATION" - no changes are allowed after this. Step 6: Pay the application fee of ₹1,000 + ₹180 (18% GST) = ₹1,180/- online using Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, IMPS, or Mobile Wallets. Step 7: Save/print the e-Receipt. Applications are not registered until both the photograph and signature are successfully uploaded. Important: Application fees are non-refundable . Once submitted, applications cannot be withdrawn or modified. Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment Online Link: Apply Here Daily Current Affairs 24 June 2026: Download Free PDF Now

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Application
content_sections.text: Before starting your application, ensure you have the following ready: Recent passport-size colour photograph Signature on white paper (black ink) Left thumb impression on white paper Handwritten declaration in English (black ink) Valid personal email ID and active mobile number Payment method (debit/credit card or net banking) Domicile certificate of Sangli District MS-CIT or equivalent computer certificate

content_sections.heading: Identity Verification at Examination Hall
content_sections.text: This section is critical for candidates who qualify for the exam. Bringing the correct documents to the exam centre is mandatory. Candidates must carry the call letter along with original and photocopy of a valid photo ID bearing the same name as registered. Accepted IDs include: PAN Card Passport Voter's ID Card Aadhaar Card / E-Aadhaar Permanent Driving Licence Bank Passbook with photograph Employee ID / Bar Council ID with photograph Ration Cards and Learner's Driving Licences are NOT valid ID proofs.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 444 vacancies for the post of Clerk (Junior Assistant) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Sangli DCC Bank Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application and pay the fee is 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for Sangli DCC Bank Junior Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹1,180/- (₹1,000 + 18% GST) for all categories. This fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q4. Is MS-CIT mandatory for Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, MS-CIT or an equivalent recognized computer certificate is required. However, graduates or post-graduates in Computer Science or IT are exempt from this requirement.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Sangli DCC Bank Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age as on 20/06/2026 (born not before 21/06/1991).

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary of a Clerk in Sangli DCC Bank?
faq.answer: During the probation period of 12 months, clerks receive a monthly stipend of ₹22,000/-. After confirmation, they receive pay as per the bank's clerk pay scale.

faq.question: Q7. Is domicile certificate of Sangli mandatory?
faq.answer: Yes, a valid Sangli District domicile certificate is mandatory for all applicants.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Sangli DCC Bank Clerk exam be held?
faq.answer: The online exam will be held at four centres: Sangli, Kolhapur, Satara, and Pune. Centre allocation is at the bank's discretion.

faq.question: Q9. Is there negative marking in the Sangli DCC Bank Clerk exam?
faq.answer: Yes, 0.25 marks will be deducted for every wrong answer. Unattempted questions carry no penalty.

faq.question: Q10. How can I download the Sangli DCC Bank Clerk Admit Card 2026?
faq.answer: Hall tickets will be available on sanglidccb.bank.in/career 7–10 days before the exam date. Candidates will need their registration number and date of birth to access it.
